Methodology

Data source: Medicare Part D Spending by Drug (dataset ID: partd-drug-spending). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 14,309.

Medicare Part D Spending by Drug reports total spending, claims, and beneficiaries for prescription drugs under the Medicare Part D program. Part B spending data covers drugs administered by physicians. Discarded units data shows wastage of single-dose vial drugs.

Full methodology →
